dialogueChunks.intro: The tide has turned, {player_name}. {quest_threat_The} {quest_threat_has} finally relented, and {quest_stakes_the} {quest_stakes_is} going to make it.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Your persistence to {quest_action} in the face of one setback after another is what saved us. {quest_focus_The} {quest_focus_is} stabilized, and {quest_ally} is organizing the recovery.
dialogueChunks.outro: Sometimes all it takes is one person who refuses to quit. You were that person.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I think our luck has finally changed. {quest_threat_The} {quest_threat_is} behind us, and {quest_stakes_the} survived.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_focus_The} still needs work, but the crisis has passed. {quest_ally} says the worst is over, and I believe it this time.
dialogueChunks.outro: You fought against cruel fate itself and won. That is no small thing.

dialogueChunks.intro: Against all odds, {player_name}, we survived. {quest_threat_The} threw everything at us, and we are still standing.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} secured. {quest_focus_The} can be rebuilt properly now. {quest_ally} has already drawn up plans to prevent this from happening again.
dialogueChunks.outro: When misfortune came knocking, you answered the door and sent it packing. We are grateful beyond words.
